scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Reply.io surface (contact lists, custom fields, blacklist rules, sequences, templates, webhooks) is out of scope until Pass B. Reply.io is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; Reply.io connector is read-only
